---
title: "Ralf Gabriels"
description: "Postdoctoral researcher, peptide rescoring and proteomics data standards"
image: ../assets/images/ralf.jpg
order: 2
---

## About

Research focus: PSM rescoring pipelines, open data standards for proteomics, and software infrastructure for mass spectrometry-based proteomics.

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/compomics)
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/)
